title: Group Limits
excerpt: What is the maximum number of groups allowed per board?

posts.author: bryanblount (Bryan Blount)
posts.cookedHtml: What is the maximum number of groups allowed per board?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @bryanblount ,

Welcome to the monday community!

Last limit I am aware of is I believe 5000 groups per board.

So you should not reach a limit on that any time soon. Even without reaching a group limit, if you start approaching a very high number of groups, you might want to rethink the way you have structured your account in order to make it more efficient and easy to handle for you.

You could use new boards and connect them if need be, template boards and other solutions depending on your needs.

Should you need any help feel free to reach out!

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
